texto: Oscar is the exact opposite of how I think you should behave. I just think of it as a negative view of the positive mind I have. Big Bird is sweet and nice and also sympathetic, as kids can identify with him even though he looks like such a bizarre character - great 8 feet 2 inches, a beak 18 inches long.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Caroll Spinney: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Oscar is the exact opposite of how I think you should behave. I just think of it as a negative vi…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, character, great pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de great e bird.
